Project

  • Changelog
Back to top

Server¶

FastAPI application for the dashboard backend. Requires the [server] optional dependency group (pip install "llmeval[server]").

FastAPI application for the llmeval dashboard backend.

Endpoints:

GET /api/suites — discover local suite YAML files GET /api/runs — paginated run list POST /api/runs — trigger a new eval run GET /api/runs/{run_id} — full run with results GET /api/runs/{run_id_a}/diff/{run_id_b} — per-test diff

Run llmeval serve to start the server, or mount create_app() into an existing ASGI application.

class RunSummary(*, run_id, suite_name, suite_version, model, judge_model, started_at, completed_at, total_tests, passed_tests, failed_tests, errored_tests)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Lightweight run record for the list endpoint.

Parameters:

  • run_id (str)

  • suite_name (str)

  • suite_version (str)

  • model (str)

  • judge_model (str)

  • started_at (str)

  • completed_at (str | None)

  • total_tests (int)

  • passed_tests (int)

  • failed_tests (int)

  • errored_tests (int)

run_id: str¶
suite_name: str¶
suite_version: str¶
model: str¶
judge_model: str¶
started_at: str¶
completed_at: str | None¶
total_tests: int¶
passed_tests: int¶
failed_tests: int¶
errored_tests: int¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class RunRequest(*, suite_path, model=None, tags=[], concurrency=5)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Body for POST /api/runs.

Parameters:

  • suite_path (str)

  • model (str | None)

  • tags (list[str])

  • concurrency (int)

suite_path: str¶
model: str | None¶
tags: list[str]¶
concurrency: int¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class RunStarted(*, run_id, status='running')[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Immediate response from POST /api/runs.

Parameters:

  • run_id (str)

  • status (str)

run_id: str¶
status: str¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

class TestDiffOut(*, test_id, result_a, result_b, is_regression, is_improvement, score_delta)[source]¶

Bases: BaseModel

Serialisable form of TestDiff.

Parameters:

  • test_id (str)

  • result_a (TestResult | None)

  • result_b (TestResult | None)

  • is_regression (bool)

  • is_improvement (bool)

  • score_delta (float | None)

test_id: str¶
result_a: TestResult | None¶
result_b: TestResult | None¶
is_regression: bool¶
is_improvement: bool¶
score_delta: float | None¶
model_config: ClassVar[ConfigDict] = {}¶

Configuration for the model, should be a dictionary conforming to [ConfigDict][pydantic.config.ConfigDict].

create_app(db_path='llmeval.db')[source]¶

Instantiate and configure the FastAPI application.

Parameters:

db_path (str) – Path to the SQLite database file.

Returns:

A configured fastapi.FastAPI instance ready to serve.

Return type:

FastAPI
